evidence.source_title: IRGC Appoints Ali Abdollahi as New Commander of Khatam al-Anbiya Headquarters
evidence.description: Aliabadi succeeded Shadmani as KCHQ commander after Shadmani was killed, suggesting Shadmani held command authority over the KCHQ structure during his brief tenure.

editorial_notes: Aliabadi's exact position during Shadmani's brief command is uncertain; he was appointed as full commander only in September 2025.
